items.name_cn:
【Top】🔥Marmont Quilted
Brand new Tote bag, the entire body is made of original factory cowhide❗️Added a lock design at the opening for extra security. The original leather texture is amazing. The 3D quilted pattern comes alive under the light. Very easy to style and suits all heights. A versatile must-have item!
Model 681483 Dimensions 26.5*19*11cm

items.name_en: 【With full set of packaging】!!️Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
【With full set of packaging】!!️Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder Bag
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from glossy leather and features an adjustable shoulder strap.
Model: 815700.
Size: 21.5(L) x 11(H) x 8cm(D)
Color: Brown/Canvas.

items.name_cn:
# 🔥Best-selling Ophida Envelope Bag#
▫️Model:503877(Original Leather)
▫️Size:26*17.5*8cm
A sales king 👑 Classic premium faux canvas with jacquard tapestry stripes, brown leather trim, an oval leather label on the front, and gold double-G hardware with a magnetic closure. It features a silk lining and two compartments. Large capacity with a chain shoulder strap. The bag opens like a fan, very aesthetic. No wonder it is so hot and sought after in the market 🔥🔥

# 🔥Marmont Original Leather#
▫️Model: 443497
▫️Size: 26*15*7cm
💚New, elegant light olive green! A very popular classic in the collection. The leather has been upgraded. The classic double-G design, the best-selling model. The simple flap design adds two letters 'G' to instantly elevate the look. The 3D embroidery brings the whole bag to life under the light, simply irresistible.

items.name_cn:
# GG Marmont Handbag 🔥
▫️Model:498110
▫️Size:27*19*8 cm
 Made from imported premium cowhide, the bag holds its shape well. Featuring a popular embroidered design and a vintage gold double-G flip cover that carries the bag's aesthetic. This bag is similar to a briefcase with a large interior space. It features both a leather shoulder strap and a handle, allowing for versatile styling. The bag has a very elegant, three-dimensional feel and is very fashionable, giving off a delicate, girlish vibe. Plus, it has a large heart on the back—how can you resist such a big heart?

Model 547965 Size 22*29*15
Backpacks are always an essential part, presented in various styles, made of high-end PVC material with woven leather trim. Embellished red and green woven strap details on the back of the bag, black mesh on the back of the strap, and double G accessories design. These classic elements always keep this bag full of vitality.

#🔥 Savoy Travel Bag#
▫️Model 834469 Brown
▫️Dimensions 48*28*18
Gucci's latest Savoy series masterfully blends beige and dark brown tones with a classic silhouette, crafted from selected soft-touch fabric. This travel bag is made from coated GG interlocking fabric.

items.name_cn:
#🔥Diana Canvas G Flower Bamboo Bag#
▫️Model:655661
▫️Size:20*16*10cm
Exploded 💥 Recreating the classic bamboo 🪵 The tote shape everyone loves fused with retro classic bamboo elements❗️Made with original cowhide and G canvas, full leather lining 👍🏼Full copper hardware with two buckle straps that complement each other, highlighting a lively and elegant temperament. Fashionable and retro. The capacity is beyond imagination, it is simply too eye-catching on the street, unique, versatile, and premium!
